meaning: n.产于欧洲的黑醋栗,黑醋栗所酿的酒
examples: The nose is tamarillo, cassis, fresh tobacco, fruit tea and cinnamon.
The jagged cliffs of Cassis drop down to the Mediterranean Sea.
A perfect bold, ripe, blackcurranty Cabernet, complete with a creamy, cassis finish.
Dark blue-black fruits, complex layers of spice and blackberry, some cassis, just an abundant galaxy of taste pleasures.
Everything was as it should have been in this spectacular wine, which resonated with aromas of plum, cassis, chocolate and white smoke.
